Won't do: threat model too low (disable-model-invocation + user supervision in interactive runs; scheduled runs bypass allowed-tools via --dangerously-skip-permissions) relative to break risk if middle-wildcards don't match permission patterns
Shipped create-skill wrapper in skill-tools v1.2.5

Reproduced and diagnosed. Root cause: zsh echo interprets backslash escapes in captured JSON, corrupting it before jq parses. File on disk is valid; caller shell is the vector. Fixture + repro script committed in e698711.

wait-for-response.sh now re-emits via `jq -ce . response.json`: compact, validated output on exit 0, loud non-zero exit with jq error on stderr for corrupt input. The zsh-echo caller corruption is a separate contract issue addressed in claude-plugins-npj. Commit 1a99f01.
Regression suite at plugins/hotline/tests/wait-for-response_test.sh covers all matrix cases plus zsh-safe caller patterns. 13/13 pass in ~1.5s. Commit 18c2ed9.

SKILL.md caller pattern updated to read from $CALL_DIR/response.json directly (zsh-safe). Unsafe echo-pipe pattern called out explicitly with the parse-error signature so reports find their way back here. hotline plugin bumped to 0.8.1. Commit 9fe66bb.
Audited all 17 README files and replaced /plugin slash-command forms with claude plugin CLI forms. 50 occurrences replaced. Pushed in commit 9cb72d6.
Design decision captured: new plugin 'docs-tools' + skill name 'fetch-docs'. Unblocks gko and makes olk required.
Revised: plugin home is 'research-tools' (named by activity, matches *-tools pattern) + skill name 'fetch-docs'.
Design captured on the issue notes (surface, ttl/slug/md flags, detection rules, output convention) and implemented in the shipped SKILL.md + fetch-docs.sh.
Plugin scaffolded at plugins/research-tools/ with .claude-plugin/plugin.json, README.md, marketplace.json entry, top-level README entry.
Generalized into plugins/research-tools/skills/fetch-docs/scripts/fetch-docs.sh. Review-skill keeps its thin hardcoded wrapper — no upstream dependency on the generic script.
SKILL.md shipped at plugins/research-tools/skills/fetch-docs/SKILL.md — 109 lines, prerequisites live-check, examples for raw/HTML-to-md/MD-source/slug/TTL, troubleshooting.

9 cases exercised: 401/403 fail loud, 3-hop redirect follows correctly, redirect-to-.md detects Content-Type of final hop, charset-suffixed Content-Type parses correctly (tolower added), empty 200 body fails loud, invalid scheme fails via curl, missing node/npx caught pre-fetch, SPA pages fail fast via readability-cli -l exit instead of emitting CSS garbage. Bugs fixed in-script: Content-Type tolower, node+npx precheck moved pre-fetch, -l exit default.

6-URL corpus run. After switching turndown-cli to atx+fenced (--head=2 --code=2): github-readme (2850 lines, 183 atx headings, 72 fences, 173 links), helpscout (233 lines, 21 headings), overreacted.io (177 lines, 10 fences, 12 links) all clean. MDN: prose clean but LiveSample code embeds don't survive — partial. Anthropic docs: Loading-only skeleton — legitimate limitation (JS-rendered SPA; curl can't execute). Gumroad SPA fails loud via readability -l exit. SKILL.md troubleshooting updated with JS-rendered-docs caveat.

Live-verified on Ubuntu 6.8 / x86_64 via cmux ssh jtbot. All 10 smoke tests pass identically to macOS: (1) .md URL → same path, (2) HTML raw → same size, (3) --md pipeline → 233 lines/21 headings, (4-6) 404/unknown-flag/missing-URL all fail cleanly with same exit codes, (7) SPA fail-fast via -l exit, (8) cache hit 9ms, (9) slug hash 4dc77b8f88a3 matches macOS (md5sum fallback produces identical 12-char prefix), (10) stat -c %Y produces integer epoch. Fallback logic for md5/md5sum and stat -f/-c works seamlessly; mktemp -t behavior differs path-wise but both produce writable tempfiles. No Linux-specific bugs found. All platform divergence points handled.

Verified live in a fresh Claude Code session on this macOS host after /plugin install + /reload-plugins. q54: /fetch-docs slash form (expands to /research-tools:fetch-docs) fired on all 3 user-supplied URLs without permission prompts — .md-source detection correct for code.claude.com/skills.md and jtsternberg.com/the-stick-that-stuck.md, --md pipeline correct for macwhisper.helpscoutdocs.com. 5r0: 3 natural-language phrasings all fired Skill(research-tools:fetch-docs), never WebFetch. Discovered during QA that Claude was inconsistently auto-Reading the fetched file; added explicit 'do not Read by default' rule to SKILL.md (path-first, let follow-up turns trigger Reads naturally). Re-verified post-rule: default triggers stop at path, explicit 'read the actual page' still Reads per user instruction.

Fixed: per-call nonce in STATUS markers prevents --resume scrollback replay from being matched as a fresh response. Dialer prepends [CALL_ID: <hex>] to prompt; receiver echoes call_id=<hex> on every STATUS line; wait-for-response.sh requires nonce match.

Added --wait-ready flag: forces PTY attach via focus-pane + echo-marker round-trip probe (executes-not-rendered signal — works with powerline prompts). Verified end-to-end on JT's powerline setup; no code callers existed, docs updated.

Added transcript-file Signal B alongside banner regex; cwd.txt written by launcher, wait-for-session.sh checks ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/<preset>.jsonl. Encoding: s|[/.]|-|g (verified against live ~/.claude/projects/ entries). Augmented timeout error to name which signals were observed. 10/10 new+existing cmux tests pass.

Implemented promote-draft skill at plugins/collab-tools/skills/promote-draft/SKILL.md. Companion to temp-draft: moves a /tmp draft to its permanent home, offers to strip -draft/-YYYY-MM-DD suffix from filename, suggests git add if destination is in a repo. Skill-only (no command file), namespaced as /collab-tools:promote-draft per user preference.
Fixed: SKILL.md Step 4/5 now pass --resume+--fork-session together via TARGET_SESSION_ID; all 3 launch scripts hard-error on --fork-session without --resume. Added guard regression tests.

Replaced case-sensitive string equality with device:inode same_dir() check in symlink-resolution fallback; verified case-variant and symlink-representation paths now match while nonexistent/different dirs do not. Bumped plugin to 1.0.5.

Fixed: upload.sh now accepts --folder <id-or-url> and a positional folder URL, extracting the bare folder ID; gdoc.sh dispatch scans all args for a doc URL so --folder routes to create. SKILL.md updated. Verified repro no longer errors. plugin.json 1.10.0→1.11.0.

Fixed, but root cause was different than diagnosed: +send --draft WAS persisting drafts — into the active gws account (dw/justin@dsgnwrks.pro), while verification ran against the default account and the u/0 URL pointed at the wrong account index. draft.sh now uses drafts.create + drafts.get verification, surfaces the account email, and prints an authuser=-addressed URL.
Invalid — gws gmail +send --draft works correctly. The 'missing draft' was an account mismatch: draft landed in active gws account (dw), verification checked the default account. No CLI bug.
